caption: A woman with black hair and glasses stands before a solid black background. She is wearing a light green, long-sleeved tunic with small red floral accents and a dark beaded necklace. A small black lapel microphone is clipped to the center of her neckline. The "NPTEL" logo, featuring a stylized yellow and red graphic, appears in the bottom-left and bottom-center areas of the scene. Across the sequence, the woman is speaking, and her mouth movements and facial expressions shift slightly as she talks. Her head remains centered and her posture stays consistent throughout the clip. There are no other people or objects present in the frame.
